name: Vessel - Expedition Trail Edition Black
summary: The Vessel Expedition Trail Edition Black is a premium 510-thread vape pen battery built for durability, performance, and retail appeal.
description: The Vessel Expedition Trail Edition Black is a premium 510-thread vape pen battery built for durability, performance, and retail appeal. Designed by California-based VESSEL, this rugged cartridge battery features a robust anodized aluminium body with a knurled grip, making it ideal for customers who want both style and reliability in a portable format. Created for active, on-the-go use, the Expedition Trail Edition includes interchangeable end caps, allowing users to customise their look while maintaining VESSEL’s signature minimalist aesthetic. VESSEL is known globally for elevating the standard 510 vape battery into a premium lifestyle accessory. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
